title: oxyacantha heterophylla
intro: Oxyacantha heterophylla, also known as the white hawthorn or hawthorn, is a shrub or small tree native to Europe, North Africa, and Western Asia, with thorny branches and clusters of small, fragrant flowers. The medicinal properties of Oxyacantha heterophylla lie in its berries, leaves, and flowers, which have been used to treat various cardiovascular issues, including high blood pressure, heart failure, and angina. The health benefits of Oxyacantha heterophylla include reducing inflammation, lowering cholesterol levels, and improving circulation, which can help prevent cardiovascular diseases and reduce the risk of heart attacks and strokes. The herbal preparations of Oxyacantha heterophylla include teas, tinctures, capsules, and extracts, which can be used to support heart health and overall well-being.
